name: 中国
description: 拥有数千年连续文明史，历史上经历了统一与分裂的多次轮回，也是二十世纪多场重大战争的参战国。
descriptionEn: A continuous civilization spanning thousands of years, China endured repeated cycles of unification and fragmentation and was a party to many major wars of the 20th century.

name: 美国
description: 18 世纪独立后迅速扩张，20 世纪成为两次世界大战与冷战的关键力量。
descriptionEn: Independent since the 18th century and expanding rapidly, the US became a key player in both world wars and the Cold War.

name: 英国
description: 曾建立庞大的殖民帝国，在拿破仑战争、两次世界大战中扮演核心角色。
descriptionEn: Once builder of a vast colonial empire, the UK played a central role in the Napoleonic Wars and both world wars.

name: 德国
description: 19 世纪统一后迅速崛起，发动了两次世界大战，深刻改变了现代历史走向。
descriptionEn: Unified in the 19th century and rising swiftly, Germany launched two world wars that profoundly shaped modern history.

name: 法国
description: 欧洲大陆传统强国，经历了百年战争、拿破仑战争与两次世界大战。
descriptionEn: A traditional power of the European continent, France went through the Hundred Years' War, the Napoleonic Wars, and both world wars.

name: 俄罗斯
description: 领土横跨欧亚，参与了拿破仑战争、两次世界大战及冷战时期的多场冲突。
descriptionEn: Spanning Europe and Asia, Russia took part in the Napoleonic Wars, both world wars, and numerous Cold War conflicts.

name: 日本
description: 明治维新后走上扩张道路，参与了甲午战争、日俄战争与第二次世界大战。
descriptionEn: After the Meiji Restoration Japan embarked on expansion, joining the First Sino-Japanese War, the Russo-Japanese War, and World War II.

name: 意大利
description: 古罗马帝国的继承者，现代意大利在两次世界大战中均为重要参战国。
descriptionEn: Heir to the Roman Empire, modern Italy was a major belligerent in both world wars.

name: 埃及
description: 古代文明的发祥地之一，见证了十字军东征、拿破仑远征与现代中东战争。
descriptionEn: One of the cradles of ancient civilization, Egypt witnessed the Crusades, Napoleon's expedition, and modern Middle Eastern wars.

name: 希腊
description: 西方文明摇篮，伯罗奔尼撒战争与希波战争的发源地。
descriptionEn: Cradle of Western civilization and birthplace of the Peloponnesian and Greco-Persian Wars.

name: 印度
description: 南亚次大陆文明古国，历经孔雀王朝扩张、莫卧儿征服与英殖民战争。
descriptionEn: An ancient civilization of the South Asian subcontinent, India saw Mauryan expansion, Mughal conquest, and British colonial wars.

name: 蒙古
description: 13 世纪蒙古帝国的核心，成吉思汗的西征震撼了欧亚大陆。
descriptionEn: Heart of the 13th-century Mongol Empire, whose westward conquests under Genghis Khan shook Eurasia.

name: 阿富汗
description: 位于中亚十字路口的“帝国坟场”，历经英阿战争、苏阿战争与美军阿富汗战争。
descriptionEn: The 'graveyard of empires' at the crossroads of Central Asia, surviving the Anglo-Afghan Wars, the Soviet-Afghan War, and the US-led Afghanistan War.

name: 伊拉克
description: 美索不达米亚文明发源地，现代经历了两伊战争、海湾战争与伊拉克战争。
descriptionEn: Birthplace of Mesopotamian civilization; in modern times it endured the Iran-Iraq War, the Gulf War, and the Iraq War.

name: 伊朗
description: 波斯文明的继承者，1979 年伊斯兰革命后与西方及伊拉克爆发多场冲突。
descriptionEn: Heir to Persian civilization, Iran clashed with the West and with Iraq multiple times after the 1979 Islamic Revolution.

name: 乌克兰
description: 东欧平原上的国家，2022 年起成为俄乌冲突的主战场。
descriptionEn: A nation on the East European Plain; since 2022 it has been the main theater of the Russo-Ukrainian War.

name: 以色列
description: 1948 年建国后历经多次中东战争，是中东冲突的核心一方。
descriptionEn: Founded in 1948, Israel has fought in multiple Arab-Israeli wars and remains a central party in the Middle East conflict.

name: 越南
description: 东南亚国家，20 世纪历经抗法、抗美与中越边境冲突。
descriptionEn: A Southeast Asian nation, Vietnam in the 20th century endured wars against France, the United States, and a border conflict with China.

name: 韩国/朝鲜
description: 朝鲜半岛国家，20 世纪历经日本殖民、二战分裂与朝鲜战争，至今南北分治。
descriptionEn: A nation on the Korean Peninsula; in the 20th century it survived Japanese colonization, WWII-era partition, and the Korean War, and remains divided to this day.

name: 西班牙
description: 伊比利亚半岛国家，曾建立庞大殖民帝国，20 世纪经历残酷内战。
descriptionEn: An Iberian nation that built a vast colonial empire and endured a brutal civil war in the 20th century.

name: 土耳其
description: 奥斯曼帝国的继承者，地跨欧亚，参与了一战、希土战争与多次中东冲突。
descriptionEn: Successor to the Ottoman Empire, straddling Europe and Asia, Turkey took part in WWI, the Greco-Turkish War, and several Middle Eastern conflicts.

name: 古巴
description: 加勒比海岛国，冷战时期因导弹危机险些引发核战争。
descriptionEn: A Caribbean island nation that nearly triggered nuclear war during the Cold War missile crisis.

name: 卢旺达
description: 东非内陆国家，1994 年发生震惊世界的种族灭绝，百日内近百万人丧生。
descriptionEn: A landlocked East African nation; in 1994 it suffered a genocide that shocked the world, with nearly a million killed in a hundred days.

name: 塞尔维亚
description: 巴尔干半岛国家，前南斯拉夫核心，历经两次世界大战与南联盟战争。
descriptionEn: A Balkan nation and core of the former Yugoslavia, Serbia weathered both world wars and the Yugoslav Wars.

name: 也门
description: 阿拉伯半岛古国，2014 年爆发内战至今，酿成当代最严重的人道主义危机之一。
descriptionEn: An ancient land on the Arabian Peninsula; its ongoing civil war since 2014 has created one of the worst humanitarian crises of our time.

name: 加拿大
description: 北美国家，作为英联邦成员参与了一战、二战及阿富汗战争。
descriptionEn: A North American nation that, as a Commonwealth member, took part in WWI, WWII, and the War in Afghanistan.

name: 澳大利亚
description: 大洋洲国家，作为英联邦成员参与了一战、二战、越南战争与阿富汗战争。
descriptionEn: An Oceanian nation that, as a Commonwealth member, fought in WWI, WWII, the Vietnam War, and the War in Afghanistan.
